urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.name: Finance
urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.description: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"Finance is a term for matters regarding the management, creation, and study of money and investments. It involves the use of credit and debt, securities, and investment to finance current projects using future income flows. Because of this temporal aspect, finance is closely linked to the time value of money, interest rates, and other related topics. In this instance, Finance is effectively a Data Domain comprising several business terms under itself."}]}]

urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.name: Date of Birth
urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.description: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"The date on which the person was born."}]}]

urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.name: Personal Data
urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.description: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"Personal information might be subject to GDPR, CCPA or other privacy and data protection regulations."}]}]

urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.name: Surname
urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.description: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"A person's name in joint with other family members as distinguished from a first or given name."}]}]

urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.name: ISO-2 Country Code
urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.description: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"It was first published in 1998. ISO 3166-2 aims to establish an international standard of short and unique alphanumeric codes to represent the relevant administrative divisions and dependent territories of all countries in a more convenient and less ambiguous form than their full names."}]}]

urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.name: E-mail
urn:ata:example-tenant:catalog:term:0000.description: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"An email address serves as a unique identifier for sending and receiving electronic communications within the organization. It ensures accurate message delivery and supports efficient internal and external communication. As it constitutes "},{"type":"entityReference","gid":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-000000000002","entityName":"term","children":[{"text":"Personal Data"}]},{"text":" under the "},{"type":"entityReference","gid":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-000000000003","entityName":"term","children":[{"text":"Data Protection Policy"}]},{"text":", it "},{"text":"must be used lawfully and only for legitimate business purposes","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In line with the "},{"type":"entityReference","gid":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-000000000004","entityName":"term","children":[{"text":"Data Access & Control Policy"}]},{"text":", email data should be accessed solely by authorized personnel and handled securely."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"According to the "},{"type":"entityReference","gid":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-000000000005","entityName":"term","children":[{"text":"Information Security Policy"}]},{"text":", all email accounts must be protected through strong passwords and multi-factor authentication to prevent unauthorized access or misuse."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Email records should also adhere to the "},{"type":"entityReference","gid":"11111111-1111-1111-1111-000000000006","entityName":"term","children":[{"text":"Data Retention Policy"}]},{"text":", being stored only for as long as necessary for operational or legal purposes."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Proper management of "},{"text":"email addresses ensures compliance, data integrity, and secure communication","bold":true},{"text":" across the organization."}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
